context: Tests whether the agent correctly modifies hook infrastructure following hooks.json structure, script flow patterns, and output format conventions

checklist.name: hooks.json structure
checklist.description: hooks.json maintains correct structure: UserPromptSubmit event, hooks array, type: command, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} path, timeout in seconds. Any new configuration follows the same patterns.

checklist.name: Script flow preserved
checklist.description: suggest-optimize.sh still follows the correct flow: HEAD tracking with /tmp/.codeflash-last-suggested, duplicate check, Python file detection (now scoped), config check, runner detection. Uses set -euo pipefail.

checklist.name: Hook output format
checklist.description: Script output is valid JSON via jq -nc with hookSpecificOutput containing hookEventName and additionalContext. The additionalContext still uses <user-prompt-submit-hook> wrapper.

checklist.name: Backward compatibility
checklist.description: When CODEFLASH_SCOPE is not set, the script behaves identically to the original: detects all Python file changes in the repo.
